name: Chocolate Chip Cheesecake Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and melted margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, and flour. Mix on medium speed until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Blend in sour cream and vanilla.
6. Stir in chocolate chips and pour into the crust.
7. Bake at 350°F for 55 minutes.
8. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing it.
9. Chill thoroughly. Garnish with whipped cream and fresh mint leaves, if desired.
